grader.method: Blindly read each current home and lesson dossier in full reading order, evaluated the four rubric dimensions as one learner journey, and recorded only consolidated page judgments.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The home page frames a five-phase journey from next-token prediction through architecture, training, deployment, reliability, and advanced specialization.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page gives a motivated beginner a credible map of the full stack, clear evidence boundaries, and a strong cumulative reason to proceed. Phase and track descriptions make the learning destination concrete without presenting optional external work as required.
revisionPriorities: Reconcile the phase-five ‘lessons 40–44’ label with the later statement that lessons 41–44 are parallel specializations.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The opening lesson turns a familiar prompt-response interaction into a system-level account of predictions, evidence, authority, and appropriate trust.
wholePageReview.feedback: The meeting-notes, live-weather, and ticket-transfer contrasts steadily raise the stakes while preserving the central mechanism. Prediction gates and the changed case make learners distinguish model output from evidence and runtime authority rather than merely repeat a definition.

wholePageReview.synopsis: This lesson builds the tensor-shape language needed to follow batched token representations and their projections through an LLM.
wholePageReview.feedback: Concrete dimensions, the manual red/fox projection, broadcasting boundaries, and shape-aware transfer checks make the abstractions inspectable. The arithmetic and notation agree across prose, code, lab, and assessment, so the learner can trace rather than memorize shapes.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson follows logits through stable softmax and cross-entropy while separating probability normalization from calibration and correctness.
wholePageReview.feedback: The numerical losses, masked-token example, and changed distributions expose exactly what the objective rewards. Misconceptions about confidence and truth are handled explicitly, and the learner must calculate and diagnose before seeing the expected reasoning.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page explains gradients as local sensitivities composed backward through a computation graph to assign parameter-level credit.
wholePageReview.feedback: The worked chain-rule value, autograd comparison, shape checks, and failure diagnoses form a coherent bridge from scalar derivatives to model training. Learners must identify the first incorrect transformation and transfer the mechanism to a changed graph.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The optimizer lesson connects gradients, state, learning-rate schedules, update rules, memory cost, and matched-quality comparisons.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page does more than name SGD and Adam: it traces how stored moments and schedules change updates, then makes learners inspect stability and resource trade-offs. The cumulative foundations project provides a meaningful synthesis rather than a click-through ending.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson explains tokenization as a reversible model-specific interface, covering subwords, bytes, vocabulary IDs, boundaries, and production compatibility.
wholePageReview.feedback: The byte and subword traces clearly separate text, token pieces, and integer identities, while the transfer task tests the tokenizer-model contract. One exact-ID retrieval prompt is harder than necessary because its arbitrary toy mapping is revealed only after commitment, but the surrounding mechanism and independent assessment remain complete.
revisionPriorities: Expose the toy vocabulary-to-ID mapping before asking learners to reproduce the exact numeric ID trace.

wholePageReview.synopsis: This page presents embeddings as learned vocabulary-row lookups and distinguishes static input rows from later contextual hidden states.
wholePageReview.feedback: Shapes, lookup arithmetic, a pinned GPT-2 validation boundary, and the decision studio reinforce the same causal story. The lesson anticipates the common claim that one vector permanently contains a word's meaning and gives learners multiple ways to correct it.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson separates permutation symmetry, causal direction, absolute position, and relative distance before introducing positional methods such as RoPE.
wholePageReview.feedback: Controlled reorderings and long-context falsifiers make the invisible role of position observable. The page carefully avoids implying that a causal mask alone supplies full position geometry, and every objective receives a concrete mechanism, boundary, and changed-case check.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The attention page traces queries, keys, values, scaled scores, masks, normalized weights, and value mixing with explicit tensor shapes.
wholePageReview.feedback: The worked calculation, code trace, and assessed transfer maintain one precise mechanism from token states to contextual outputs. It also places an important interpretability limit on attention weights, preventing a visually compelling matrix from being mistaken for a full causal explanation.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page assembles attention, MLPs, residual streams, and normalization into a shape-preserving Transformer block and cumulative depth story.
wholePageReview.feedback: Pre-norm and post-norm contrasts are causal rather than merely architectural labels, and the page states where analogies about layered understanding break. Worked shapes, residual updates, and a changed-case assessment support transfer without claiming clean one-layer concepts.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson turns text into shifted next-token training pairs and explains masking, packing boundaries, teacher forcing, and autoregressive generation.
wholePageReview.feedback: Token-level traces expose exactly which inputs predict which targets and why packed examples need segment-aware masks. The comparison between parallel training and sequential generation is precise, and changed cases test leakage and boundary handling rather than definition recall.

wholePageReview.synopsis: This synthesis page carries one batch through embeddings, repeated Transformer blocks, vocabulary logits, shifted loss, optimization, checkpointing, and generation.
wholePageReview.feedback: The complete shape spine and leakage/resume checks turn prior lessons into an implementable mental model. Pinned external evidence is clearly optional, while the required capstone includes scaffolding, local correctness checks, failure evidence, rubric, and a gated worked reference.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The pre-training overview connects data, token accounting, objective, optimization, checkpoints, evaluation, and evidence into one reproducible pipeline.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page orients the learner to the whole lifecycle before later chapters deepen individual stages. Token-budget arithmetic, decision practice, and the OLMo validation boundary consistently distinguish deterministic teaching fixtures from claims about an actual training run.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page treats an objective as a complete target, mask, serialization, and stage contract rather than a loss-function name alone.
wholePageReview.feedback: Causal LM, role masking, tool-call serialization, and architectural normalization contrasts are tied to concrete records and failure modes. The checks ask learners to decide which tokens bear loss and why, preserving the distinction between syntactic formatting and the behavior being trained.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson explains empirical scaling curves and compute allocation while keeping extrapolation, data quality, and deployment objectives in view.
wholePageReview.feedback: The matched $6ND$ calculation makes parameter-token trade-offs concrete, and the page repeatedly labels scaling relationships as empirical rather than physical laws. Transfer questions require selecting evidence under fixed constraints instead of treating bigger models as automatically better.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The data-engineering lesson follows sources through rights, parsing, filtering, deduplication, mixtures, splits, provenance, and governance decisions.
wholePageReview.feedback: The lesson treats data quality as a causal systems problem rather than a cleaning checklist. Concrete filtering and language cases, contamination boundaries, and the decision studio make learners weigh coverage, harm, leakage, and reversibility with inspectable evidence.

wholePageReview.synopsis: This lesson maps data, tensor, pipeline, and sequence parallelism to ownership, communication, topology, memory, and restart behavior.
wholePageReview.feedback: Each parallel method is explained by what is partitioned, what is replicated, which collective is required, and where it helps. The learner must trace failures and checkpoints across ranks, so the page teaches distributed correctness rather than presenting a collection of acronyms.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page compares causal, masked, span-corruption, and fill-in-the-middle objectives through their serialization, visibility, targets, and task fit.
wholePageReview.feedback: The objective families are not reduced to names: learners inspect what context each target may see and what the loss trains. Equal-token comparison and the pinned optional reproduction preserve a strong evidence boundary while the required changed cases remain local and deterministic.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson builds a multi-axis pre-training evaluation contract spanning loss, capability, contamination, safety, systems health, and uncertainty.
wholePageReview.feedback: Perplexity is accurately bounded by tokenizer and data assumptions, while capability and contamination checks are separated from training telemetry. The release decisions use predeclared gates and paired slices, preventing a single favorable curve from standing in for model quality.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The OLMo 3 case study synthesizes staged data mixtures, long-context continuation, infrastructure evidence, controls, artifacts, and bounded conclusions.
wholePageReview.feedback: Pinned revisions and explicit stage handoffs make the real system inspectable without generalizing one recipe into a universal rule. The extensive capstone asks for matched controls, failure logs, reproducibility evidence, and a decision memo, completing the pre-training arc at the right level of rigor.

wholePageReview.synopsis: This bridge lesson separates what post-training can change in weights from the evidence and runtime controls required for dependable behavior.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page reactivates pre-training concepts and establishes demonstrations, preferences, and runtime authority as distinct levers. Its scenarios and local checks prepare the learner for later SFT, preference, RL, and safety lessons without prematurely collapsing them into one alignment method.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The overview organizes post-training by the supervision available: demonstrations, comparisons, outcome checks, and deployment constraints.
wholePageReview.feedback: Stage boundaries and multidimensional regression gates prevent the learner from treating post-training as a guaranteed monotonic ladder. The Tülu evidence and decision practice are clearly scoped, while the required path remains understandable without external tools or accounts.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The SFT page teaches demonstrations as serialized, masked training records and extends the mechanism into a carefully bounded fine-tuning workshop.
wholePageReview.feedback: Role templates, assistant-only loss, packing boundaries, truncation, and evaluation are aligned across prose and exercises. The optional QLoRA workshop names its inputs and external boundary, while the required transfer task and readiness gates remain deterministic and self-contained.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson explains pairwise preference learning through relative policy-reference log-probability gaps, data quality, and shortcut risks.
wholePageReview.feedback: The DPO mechanism, beta convention, chosen/rejected records, and verbosity shortcut are treated with appropriate precision. Learners calculate relative changes and diagnose label quality before transfer, so the page does not imply that any preference pair constitutes ground truth.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page introduces policies, trajectories, rewards, returns, baselines, and advantages as the credit-assignment language needed for RL post-training.
wholePageReview.feedback: The worked batch advantage and delayed-credit cases make policy updates observable without hiding uncertainty behind jargon. The page defines its symbols before use, distinguishes reward from value, and verifies transfer on a changed trajectory with specific retry feedback.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The RLHF lesson traces demonstrations, comparison data, reward-model fitting, on-policy sampling, PPO-style updates, and KL control.
wholePageReview.feedback: The page accurately presents the reward model as a fallible proxy and makes reward exploitation, reference drift, and independent evaluation central to the mechanism. Its numerical and decision checks separate training telemetry from real outcome evidence.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson treats tool calls as constrained action proposals and places schema, authorization, confirmation, execution, recovery, and audit in runtime code.
wholePageReview.feedback: The injected calendar trace, idempotent email action, safety/usefulness slices, trust-boundary lab, and decision studio all reinforce defense in depth. Learners must allow legitimate capabilities while blocking unauthorized effects, avoiding both magical autonomy and universal refusal.

wholePageReview.synopsis: This capstone traces Tülu 3 through curation, SFT, length-normalized DPO, and RLVR, then contrasts DR Tulu's tool-mediated evolving-rubric research loop.
wholePageReview.feedback: Exact verification and open-ended rubric evaluation are matched to their answer structures, with verifier spoofing, evaluator drift, tool cost, and runtime authority kept visible. The staged project, artifacts, controls, and launch memo make the post-training synthesis complete and inspectable.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The decoding lesson turns vocabulary logits into token choices through temperature, top-k, top-p, greedy selection, sampling, constraints, and stopping.
wholePageReview.feedback: Stable-softmax and nucleus calculations are correct, inclusive cutoff conventions are explicit, and the lesson distinguishes selection policy from learned knowledge. Task-specific policy choices for extraction, creativity, and tested code make the transfer check genuinely unfamiliar.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page separates prompt prefill from sequential decode and accounts for how cached keys and values trade memory for avoided recomputation.
wholePageReview.feedback: The prefix-work comparison, cache-size formula, grouped-query boundary, and serving examples are arithmetically and conceptually aligned. Learners distinguish what is newly computed, what is reused, and why prefix sharing still requires exact identity and tenant-safe invalidation.

wholePageReview.synopsis: This lesson explains low-bit grids, scales, granularity, calibration, outliers, kernels, and the full inference-memory budget beyond model weights.
wholePageReview.feedback: The symmetric 3-bit reconstruction and 7B memory examples are transparent fixtures, not performance claims. Quality slices, kernel support, cache-dominated workloads, and a gated deployment choice prevent bit width from being mistaken for guaranteed speed or acceptable accuracy.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The serving lesson treats queues, batching, prefill/decode scheduling, overload, latency tails, throughput, utilization, and goodput as one product system.
wholePageReview.feedback: The 2,000-versus-1,700 token example clearly demonstrates why SLO-satisfying goodput can reverse a throughput ranking. Static, dynamic, and continuous batching are compared on uneven traffic, and numeric per-tier overload rules turn the objectives into testable operational decisions.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page explains test-time compute through candidate diversity, search, critique, verification, adaptive budgets, early stopping, and deployable selection.
wholePageReview.feedback: The self-consistency example and pass@N versus best-of-N diagnosis correctly separate candidate generation from selection. The service capstone integrates decoding, cache, precision, batching, reasoning, latency, memory, quality, and cost into an evidence-bearing SLO decision.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson presents context engineering as a finite interface for authority, task state, evidence, examples, constraints, and output contracts.
wholePageReview.feedback: The 4,000-token ledger, underspecified summarizer repair, injection boundary, and perturbation matrix make prioritization and robustness observable. Delimiters are correctly described as interpretive aids rather than security enforcement, and required work is locally checkable.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The RAG lesson traces versioned, authorized chunks through hybrid retrieval, reranking, context assembly, grounded generation, citation validation, and abstention.
wholePageReview.feedback: Retrieval failure is cleanly separated from evidence-use failure through oracle-context reasoning and distinct metrics. Chunking, filters, source versions, citation entailment, multilingual transfer, and the toy lab all preserve the rule that similarity is neither truth nor permission.

wholePageReview.synopsis: This lesson distinguishes deterministic workflows from bounded agent loops and assigns state, authorization, retries, idempotency, cost, and termination to the orchestrator.
wholePageReview.feedback: The sold-out booking and ambiguous-timeout traces expose how errors compound when state or operation IDs are missing. Learners choose the least autonomy required, design typed transitions, and handle non-idempotent side effects under numeric limits and explicit human escalation.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The evaluation lesson begins with a shipping decision and builds a portfolio of exact, human, and calibrated model-based measurements with slices and uncertainty.
wholePageReview.feedback: The position-biased judge example demonstrates instrument failure rather than merely warning about it. Numeric release gates, paired comparisons, severe non-compensable slices, evaluator versions, and adjudication make the lesson a complete decision-design journey.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The page threat-models assets, actors, data paths, models, retrieval, tools, users, and downstream systems under prompt injection and privacy risk.
wholePageReview.feedback: Cross-tenant retrieval and injected-content cases correctly enforce authorization before data exposure and treat generated output as untrusted downstream input. Least privilege, minimization, retention, monitoring, incident response, fairness, and appeals are integrated without suggesting a prompt can create a security boundary.

wholePageReview.synopsis: This synthesis page links request traces, stage metrics, cost attribution, privacy, release governance, canaries, rollback, incidents, and ownership.
wholePageReview.feedback: The hidden cost-regression trace shows how versions and spans localize a pipeline change without indiscriminate secret retention. The safe research-agent capstone joins context, RAG, tools, evaluation, security, operations, artifacts, and rehearsed recovery into a rigorous final applications project.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The lesson compares response, logit, feature, sequence-level, and on-policy distillation while accounting for teacher quality, student capacity, and total cost.
wholePageReview.feedback: Soft-target probabilities and temperature-scaled KL make the extra supervision concrete, while calibration and minority-slice failures expose inherited error. The response-only API transfer case correctly limits the available method and requires verified ground truth and held-out gates.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The LoRA page derives a low-rank additive update, counts trainable parameters, explains initialization, and compares rank, targets, QLoRA, merging, and routing.
wholePageReview.feedback: The $4096	imes4096$ rank-16 example and runnable first-gradient check make both savings and the zero-initialization pitfall visible. The deployment transfer preserves base-adapter provenance, tenant isolation, quality gates, and the fact that frozen-base compute and activations remain.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The MoE lesson traces per-token router scores through top-k dispatch, expert capacity, weighted combination, load balancing, communication, and serving cost.
wholePageReview.feedback: Router arithmetic and the 1,024-token capacity example are correct and transparently linked to overflow choices. The page explicitly rejects human-readable expert mythology and the claim that sparse active FLOPs erase full-weight memory, all-to-all, imbalance, or small-batch inefficiency.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The multimodal lesson follows patches or frames through modality encoders, connectors, positional information, decoder interfaces, grounding, and modality-specific evaluation.
wholePageReview.feedback: Patch-count arithmetic exposes the resolution-token-cost trade-off, while projection, cross-attention, and unified-stream designs are compared by mechanism. Noise ablations and the audio transfer case separate processor, perception, localization, reasoning, and language-prior failures.

wholePageReview.synopsis: The final page distinguishes behavioral, attribution, probing, and causal evidence, then evaluates interventions and model edits by efficacy, locality, generalization, and persistence.
wholePageReview.feedback: The Paris/Rome patching trace, sham-control boundaries, and edit fixture consistently constrain claim strength. The capstone asks learners to choose the least invasive remedy, explicitly rejects unlearning claims without a threat model, and requires reproducible controls, artifacts, side-effect evidence, and rollback.
